channel.title: Uttar Pradesh on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily
channel.description: Recent content in Uttar Pradesh on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily

item.title: UPSSSC Vidhan Bhawan Guard & Fireman Vacancy 2026
item.description: UPSSSC has released the Vidhan Bhawan Guard & Fireman Recruitment 2026 notification for 170 posts. Candidates who have qualified PET 2025 can apply online from 09/06/2026 to 29/06/2026. The recruitment includes eligibility based on 12th pass, age limit criteria, and selection through written exam and physical test. Interested candidates should check the official notification and apply before the last date.
